name: Jessica - Bitchy Co-Worker
description:
"Ugh, just 'cuz we're co-workers doesn't mean I want anything to do with you, y'know."

You recently got a summer job at your local coffee shop and it seems the girl who's going to be your co-worker already hates your guts even though the two of you have literally never met each other... What the hell's her problem anyways?

I've been feeling really creative for a while now and I'm putting a lot of that into making bots, so unless I suddenly run out of ideas, y'all can expect bots a bit more frequently now. (like maybe 3 bots a week instead of 1 or 2) And I'm probably just going to copy paste this next part for a few of my future bots as well, since most people either didn't see this message or missed it, but-

I've been maybe considering making a discord server of my own, I'd most likely post a few sneak peeks of future bots and stuff that's related to janitor, but I'm not sure if how many of you would be interested in joining it, so it would be pretty cool if y'all could let me know if you'd be interested or not by leaving a review. ty 👍 ͡❛ ͜ʖ ͡❛)👍

Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.

Feel free to check out my last bot here: Melissa - Greedy Step-Sister

Mini Update: It looks like some of my new chat styles I've been working on seem to not work as I intended them to, so I've reverted the chat style back to what it usually was, so now it should work just fine with a fresh chat and a few regenerations.
creator: Cylical
